task_completion.description: Enable the Repository module for the Core Engine project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the project settings (Modules tab), the checkbox for 'Repository' is checked.

task_completion.description: Select Git as the Source Control Management (SCM) system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the New Repository creation screen within the project settings, the SCM dropdown is set to 'Git'.
The 'Identifier' text field in the repository configuration screen contains exactly 'core-main'.

task_completion.description: Set the repository path to the specified local bare Git repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Path to repository' text field contains exactly '/srv/git/core-engine.git'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the source code files are visible in the project's repository view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main 'Repository' tab of the project is open, displaying a file tree, commit history, or source code files associated with the 'core-main' repository.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to configure the repository.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Redmine web interface, rather than terminal commands (e.g., curl) or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Redmine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Redmine layout (header, project menu, settings tabs) and is not a text editor or static mock page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final repository view.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open in the final screenshots showing the source code.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Redmine project identifier is 'core-engine'. The expected repository path is '/srv/git/core-engine.git'. The expected repository identifier is 'core-main'. The SCM type must be Git.
